design: ACB bet1 + ExtremeCol(gap>=25) bet2, orthogonal exclusion
failure_reason: STABLE and perm_p=0.005, but edge +3.33% vs ADOPTED +5.06%. McNemar not significant (p=0.124) but directionally inferior. ACB already captures extreme cold via gap_score; adding ExtremeCol as bet2 is redundant overlap.
